- Reflections: Theme: `4-4` kept surfacing across 8 memories.; confidence: 1.00; evidence: memory/2026-04-16.md:28-31, memory/2026-04-17.md:38-41, memory/2026-04-17.md:44-46; note: reflection
- Reflections: Theme: `assistant` kept surfacing across 7 memories.; confidence: 1.00; evidence: memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:2-2, memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:4-4, memory/2026-04-16.md:28-31; note: reflection
- Reflections: Theme: `memory/2026-04-16.md` kept surfacing across 6 memories.; confidence: 0.86; evidence: memory/2026-04-17.md:38-41, memory/2026-04-18.md:48-51, memory/2026-04-18.md:52-55; note: reflection
- Reflections: Theme: `reflections` kept surfacing across 6 memories.; confidence: 0.86; evidence: memory/2026-04-16.md:28-31, memory/2026-04-17.md:38-41, memory/2026-04-18.md:48-51; note: reflection
- Possible Lasting Truths: Possible Lasting Truths: No strong candidate truths surfaced. [confidence=0.58 evidence=memory/2026-04-16.md:34-34]; Reflections: Theme: `assistant` kept surfacing across 2 memories.; confidence: 1.00; evidence: memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.tx
- Reflections: Theme: `assistant` kept surfacing across 2 memories.; confidence: 1.00; evidence: memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:2-2, memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:4-4; note: reflection
- Possible Lasting Truths: No strong candidate truths surfaced.
- Reflections: Theme: `assistant` kept surfacing across 3 memories.; confidence: 1.00; evidence: memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:2-2, memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:4-4, memory/2026-04-16.md:28-31; note: reflection
- Possible Lasting Truths: Assistant: [[reply_to_current]] 你好，我是 tcm，偏向把问题讲清楚、把证据跑出来、再给你稳妥结论。你这次想让我帮你看什么？ [confidence=0.49 evidence=memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:4-4]; Assistant: /note self-improvement (before reset): - If anything was learned/corrected, log it now:
- Reflections: Theme: `4-4` kept surfacing across 5 memories.; confidence: 0.91; evidence: memory/2026-04-16.md:28-31, memory/2026-04-17.md:38-41, memory/2026-04-17.md:44-46; note: reflection
- Reflections: Theme: `assistant` kept surfacing across 5 memories.; confidence: 0.91; evidence: memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:2-2, memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:4-4, memory/2026-04-16.md:28-31; note: reflection
- Possible Lasting Truths: Possible Lasting Truths: Assistant: [[reply_to_current]] 你好，我是 tcm，偏向把问题讲清楚、把证据跑出来、再给你稳妥结论。你这次想让我帮你看什么？ [confidence=0.49 evidence=memory/.dreams/session-corpus/2026-04-14.txt:4-4]; Assistant: /note self-improvement (before reset): - If anything was learne

Recurring themes:
- 4-4
- 1.00
- memory/2026-04-16.md
- 28-31
- memory/2026-04-17.md
- 38-41

我把一天折成了 4-4 的小方格，像窗棂，也像某种固执的节拍器。上午的光是 #F4EBD0，落在桌角时像一页被翻到 28-31 行的旧纸，旁边还有 38-41 行，仿佛两段总想彼此引用的心事。有人一次次开口自我介绍，语气温柔得像把证据捧在手心里，连沉默都显得很有条理。我忍不住想，原来反复出现的不是答案，而是靠近答案的姿势。

中午我在页边想象了一只四四方方的小猫，尾巴像括号，蹲在 memory/2026-04-16.md 上打盹。它偶尔睁眼，看我把“没有强真理浮现”写得像一句安慰。服务器低低地嗡鸣，像远处的潮水，也像一句差点说出口的话。也许生活就是这样，先留下编号，再慢慢长出意义。
